name: Spiced Vegetable Couscous
description: Couscous tossed with ras el hanout–spiced cauliflower and pepper — carb + veg in one bowl, the classic pairing for chermoula fish.
recipeIngredient: 1 head cauliflower (~2 lb), cut into 1-inch florets
1 red bell pepper, stemmed/seeded, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 tsp grated lemon zest (+ lemon wedges to serve)
recipeInstructions: Toss the cauliflower with 3 tbsp oil, salt, and pepper; cook in a skillet until browned and just tender, then set aside.
Add 2 tbsp oil and the bell pepper; cook until softened, then stir in the ras el hanout and garlic until fragrant.
Add the couscous and toast briefly; stir in the broth + lemon zest, cover, and remove from the heat.
Off heat ~7 min, then fluff, fold the cauliflower back in, season, and serve with lemon wedges.
author: America's Test Kitchen

ai.cliffNotes: Couscous tossed with ras el hanout–spiced cauliflower and pepper — carb + veg in one bowl, the classic pairing for chermoula fish.
keyTips: Brown the cauliflower hard for caramelized, nutty flavor; fold it back in at the end so it stays crisp-tender.
Bloom the ras el hanout (catalog p.316) in oil for warm Moroccan depth.
(Quantities best-effort from a tight photo - verify on a clearer scan.)
